family_name: ICU / Critical Care — ICU procedure note documentation prompt
population: Critically ill people with relevant ICU procedure-note documentation facts and clinician decisions entered.
intended_setting: Partial for checklist communication; exact elements of each ICU procedure note require procedure-specific evidence and local policy.

evidence_statements.population: Patients undergoing surgery or invasive procedures where the checklist is applied.
evidence_statements.setting: Operating room or procedural setting before anesthesia, before incision, and before leaving the room.

evidence_statements.faithful_clinical_statement: As use of the Checklist has become more widespread, speciﬁc implementation factors have become more apparent. Factors for successful implementation include: Early engagement of staff Active leadership and identiﬁcation of local champions Extensive discussion, education and training Multidisciplinary involvement Coaching Ongoing feedback Local adaptation 9789241598590_eng.pdf (‎418.4Kb)‎ 9789241598590_eng_Checklist.pdf (‎92.06Kb)‎ 9789246598595_ara.pdf (‎986.2Kb)‎ 9789246598595_ara_Checklist.pdf (‎524.6Kb)‎ 9789245598596_chi.pdf (‎1.198Mb)‎ 9789245598596_chi_Checklist.pdf (‎161.9Kb)‎ 9789242598599_fre_checklist.pdf (‎485.4Kb)‎ 9789242598599_fre.pdf (‎494.0Kb)‎ 9789244598597_rus.pdf (‎522.3Kb)‎ 9789244598597_rus_Checklist.pdf (‎111.9Kb)‎ 9789243598598_spa.pdf (‎504.3Kb)‎ 9789243598598_spa_Checklist.pdf
